bugs.desc: A role created with no explicit permissions grants every action instead of starting with none
A user's assigned role fails to resolve, so a user who holds a permission is refused the action
The delete handler performs the delete for a request that has no authenticated principal
After a grant is revoked and the cache is invalidated, the revoked action still succeeds
A dispatch the guard rules disallowed still runs the protected handler body
The auditor role no longer grants read, breaking the reports path that relied on it
A caller obtains a permission it was never granted by listing it as a requested scope
A request for a user the store never registered is granted protected actions
